action.description: Action to perform: 'list' directory contents, 'read' file segment, 'metadata' for file info.

path.description: Directory path for 'list', file path for 'read' and 'metadata'.

prefix.description: Optional subdirectory prefix filter for 'list' action.

max_results.description: Maximum number of items to return for 'list' action.

offset_lines.description: Number of lines to skip for 'read' action (pagination).

line_limit.description: Maximum number of lines to return for 'read' action.
